auth.validationSummary: Enter a valid phone number and a password with at least 6 characters
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.unexpectedError: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
auth.subtitle: Sign in to access trips and live tracking with confidence
auth.formDescription: Enter your phone number and password to access trips, tracking, and alerts in one place.
auth.signInNote: Your credentials are verified over a secure connection before opening the driver account.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.permissionDeniedDetail: The app needs location access set to 'Allow all the time'. Go to Settings > Apps > Trans Allal > Permissions > Location and choose 'Allow all the time'.
tracking.startFailed: Could not start session. Check your internet connection and try again.
tracking.stopFailed: Could not stop session. Please try again.

setup.title: Enable permissions before using the app
setup.subtitle: The app stays locked until location, background execution, and notification requirements are enabled for reliable live tracking.
setup.completeDescription: All required settings are enabled. The app will open automatically.
setup.pendingDescription: Complete the following items once on this phone so tracking can keep running in the background without interruptions.
setup.locationServicesDescription: GPS and device location services must stay enabled so the app can send speed and live location updates.
setup.locationPermissionsDescription: The app needs both foreground and background location access, including the “Allow all the time” option.
setup.notificationDescription: Notifications are required for alerts, newly assigned trips, and foreground service visibility while the app runs in background.
setup.batteryOptimizationDescription: Disable battery restrictions for this app so Android does not stop background tracking.
setup.manufacturerDescription: Some phones add extra controls such as auto-start or background activity. Complete them, then confirm here.
